author: GOqH
content: Result: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings exits 0; cargo test --workspace shows 92 passed / 0 failed (parity with baseline); cargo fmt --check is clean. Specific-lint allows added with one-line justifications: cast_possible_truncation in framing (bounded by MAX_FRAME_SIZE), unused_async on run_fake_supervisor, similar_names labels_a/labels_b and repo_a_dir/repo_b_dir, too_many_lines on round_trip narrative test. No blanket allows. No public API or wire protocol changes.
